name: IRIDEX CORP
summary: IRIDEX Corporation is an ophthalmic medical technology company focused on developing and commercializing laser-based products for treating glaucoma and retinal diseases. Its proprietary MicroPulse Technology and Endpoint Management Technology enable subvisible, tissue-sparing laser therapy. Key products include the Cyclo G6 laser system, IQ 532/577 portable lasers, PASCAL system, and single-use probes (MicroPulse P3, G-Probe, EndoProbe). Fiscal year 2025 revenues were $52.7 million, with products sold in the U.S., Germany, and internationally through distributors.

products.name: Cyclo G6 Laser System
products.description: Primary glaucoma laser console with MicroPulse technology for transscleral laser therapy to reduce IOP.

products.name: IQ 532 Laser System
products.description: Portable medical retina laser system with MicroPulse technology, also used for glaucoma treatments.

products.name: IQ 577 Laser System
products.description: Portable medical retina laser system with MicroPulse technology, also used for glaucoma treatments.

products.name: PASCAL System
products.description: Integrated workstation with Endpoint Management and MicroPulse technology for retinal and glaucoma laser treatment.

products.name: OcuLight TX
products.description: Surgical retina laser photocoagulation system used in vitrectomy procedures.

products.name: OcuLight SLx
products.description: Surgical retina laser system with MicroPulse technology for photocoagulation in vitrectomy procedures.

products.name: MicroPulse P3
products.description: Patented single-use disposable probe delivering MicroPulse laser transsclerally for glaucoma treatment.

products.name: G-Probe
products.description: Single-use fiber-optic laser delivery device for transscleral ablation of ciliary processes in refractory glaucoma.

products.name: G-Probe Illuminate
products.description: Single-use probe with built-in transillumination for optimized placement in glaucoma treatment.

products.name: EndoProbe Handpieces
products.description: Family of single-use consumable probes used in surgical retina laser procedures.

products.name: MicroPulse Technology
products.description: Proprietary technology delivering microsecond laser pulses with cooling intervals for tissue-sparing ophthalmic treatment.

products.name: Endpoint Management Technology
products.description: Proprietary algorithm that titrates laser energy to subvisible, tissue-sparing levels for retinal and glaucoma treatment.

partnerships.description: Primary international distributor for IRIDEX products outside the U.S., Germany, Italy, UK (Glaucoma), India, and select smaller markets.
